name: Ralph Bowen
abstract: Ralph Bowen (born December 24, 1961) is a Canadian jazz saxophonist.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: A Gala Tribute to Celia Cruz and Tito Puente

about_quotes.speaker: Orrin Evans
about_quotes.evidence: once I got to Rutgers University, studying with Ralph Bowen, I learned... he opened my ears and my mind up to a whole world of sound
about_quotes.doc_title: Orrin Evans interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: David N. Baker
about_quotes.evidence: Fact is, he was in the band the same time Ralph Bowen was in.
about_quotes.doc_title: David N. Baker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Allen
about_quotes.evidence: I see so many of the people that were there during my four years at Rutgers... Ralph Bowen... Most everybody that was there has gone on to make it in the business.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harry Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: I had people coming down from Canada – Ralph Bowen and people like that – to study with me
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
